name: Toast Notification Creator for Intune
description: Toast Notification Creator for Intune is a remediation package that generates user-facing Windows toast alerts when issues are detected or remediation actions are applied. It integrates with the Intune Remediations framework, offering configurable message content, timing, and dismissal options to inform users and reduce unnecessary support. The package includes a detection script and a remediation script to trigger notifications and guide users through next steps.
author: Anthony Porter

securityCheck.aiSummary: The Toast Notification Creator for Intune primarily operates in the local Windows user context and does not download or execute remote code nor harvest credentials. However, there are input handling risks: unescaped user-provided Title/Message can break or corrupt generated XML; inputs embedded into a generated remediation script can cause syntax or injection issues; and the ActionButtonUrl opens external pages that could be abused for phishing. No hardcoded secrets or credential harvesting are present. Recommend escaping user inputs when building XML, escaping or parameterizing content in generated scripts, and validating/whitelisting external URLs to mitigate potential abuse. Overall, safe for legitimate admin use with these mitigations in place.
